:::: {.report-footer}
**Syria 2026 Agricultural Shocks** · first-half-2026 snapshot (floods Mar–Jun;
fires May 1 – Jun 12 2026) · figures are lower bounds (DEC-039).
Author: Muhanad Abulhusn. Rendered from human-validated (Tier-2) records only.

**Data sources:** FAO/GIEWS (baseline & production), GloFAS (discharge), CHIRPS
(rainfall), VIIRS/FIRMS (active fire), Sentinel-1/2 & Copernicus EMS (flood/burn
extent), ACLED (conflict, cited not republished). License: CC BY 4.0.

Suggested citation:

::: {.cite-block}
Abulhusn, M. (2026). *Syria 2026 Agricultural Shocks: floods and crop fires against
the 2025 record-drought baseline* (first-half-2026 snapshot).
https://muhanad-husn.github.io/flood-fire/
:::

Provenance & contracts:
[PRODUCT.md](https://github.com/Muhanad-husn/flood-fire/blob/main/docs/PRODUCT.md) ·
[STRUCTURE.md](https://github.com/Muhanad-husn/flood-fire/blob/main/docs/STRUCTURE.md) ·
[decision log](https://github.com/Muhanad-husn/flood-fire/blob/main/tracking/DECISIONS.md) ·
[source repo](https://github.com/Muhanad-husn/flood-fire)
::::
